reasoning_content:
The baseline score is 20.55 out of 100, so there's a lot of ground to cover. I need to add support for const and void in declarations, implement multiplicative operators, relational and logical operators, unary negation, control flow statements like if/while/break/continue, function definitions with parameters, function calls, parenthesized expressions, array indexing, and initializer lists. Let me start by extending the parser grammar to handle these features.

My approach is to update the lexer's token set to match what clang produces, then expand the parser grammar to support the full language, and finally extend the AST-to-ASG converter to handle all the new constructs. I should look at one of the failing test cases to better understand what the expected output structure looks like.
